commands.cmd: read-only latest-revision, index, goal privacy, plan, formula, performance and accessible-scope review

summary: Approved the bounded advanced chart vertical after preserving the existing manage-goals read boundary through a shared server access context.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: The bounded at-most-five-query workspace and five advanced non-weight views must be delivered and audited.
Weight, card/planner preferences, household analysis and rendered final evidence remain later slices.
